content_fingerprint: llama cpp adds native blackwell nvfp4 support in latest pre built binaries the open source llama cpp project released build b8967 with native nvfp4 tensor support for nvidia blackwell gpus expanding its already broad portfolio of pre built binaries across macos linux windows ios and android the ggml org llama cpp project published release tag b8967 on 29 april 2026 adding native blackwell native nvfp4 nvidia 4 bit floating point tensor support under the cuda backend via pr 22196 the release ships pre built binaries for an unusually wide range of platforms and architectures including macos appl
